laplace.name: L-shaped, u = x²
laplace.description: L-shaped domain [0,2]²\[1,2]², Dirichlet BC u = x². Non-harmonic BC forces non-trivial rational part.

laplace.name: L-shaped, u = Re(z²)
laplace.source: [C20] §3, variant with harmonic BC u = x²−y²
laplace.description: Harmonic polynomial BC. Smooth polynomial part should capture this exactly; AAA rational part should be negligible.

laplace.name: L-shaped, u = Re(eᶻ)
laplace.description: Entire-function BC. Smooth part handles bulk; AAA captures corner singularity near reentrant corner (1,1).

aaa.name: exp(z) on unit circle
aaa.description: 200 equispaced points on unit circle. Reference: 8 iterations, geometric convergence. Validated against Fortran LAPACK SVD.

aaa.name: tan(πz/2) on spiral
aaa.description: 1000 points on spiral winding 7½ times. Paper reports m=12, poles ±1 to 15 digits.

aaa.name: tan(z) on unit circle
aaa.description: 128 equispaced points on unit circle. Rational type (7,7) beats degree-52 polynomial. Poles near ±π/2.

aaa.name: log(2+z⁴)/(1−16z⁴)
aaa.description: 1000 roots of unity. Meromorphic on unit disk. 4 poles at ±0.5, ±0.5i from 1/(1−16z⁴) factor.
